text: Hello? Hello. Hi, this is Chelsea and I'm reaching out because we pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note here showing your 2026 plan update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation from you so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Just confirm for me. Do you have both part A and part B? Yes. Perfect. Let me connect you with the Medicare specialist from Colorado. Thanks for connecting. This is Anna. How are you?
